x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the Bronx DA's HTML-only content and Power-BI-locked aggregate statistics (press releases, case statistics, programs/bureaus, community resources, victim services) and adds submit_tip — the net-new write workflow that today is only a phone call or an email. Written generically so it could back one shared District Attorney API across all five NYC borough offices.

server.name: io.nyc.bronxda
server.title: Bronx District Attorney
server.description: Agent-native access to the Office of the Bronx District Attorney (Darcel D. Clark) — press releases, aggregate prosecution statistics (arrests, charging decisions, case outcomes, defendant demographics), prosecutorial bureaus and public programs, community resources, and crime-victim services, none of which has an API or Open Data today. Adds the net-new ability to submit a crime tip, a Civilian Complaint Unit complaint, or a FOIL records request.
server.instructions: The Bronx DA publishes NO Open Data and has NO API; everything here is reverse-engineered from the office's legacy .shtml site and its embedded Power BI dashboards. Use find_press_releases / get_press_release for newsroom items (indictments, sentencings, initiatives). find_case_statistics returns AGGREGATE prosecution metrics only — the numbers currently locked inside Power BI iframes — never an individual case or defendant. find_programs covers bureaus/divisions and outreach programs; find_community_resources covers record sealing (CPL 160.59), BronxCAMS, immigrant affairs, and important numbers; find_victim_services covers Crime Victims Assistance Bureau help. submit_tip (net-new) files a crime tip, a civilian complaint of police misconduct, or a FOIL request; it mutates state and today has no structured intake (a call to 718-590-2300 or an email to FOILREQUEST@BRONXDA.NYC.GOV) — confirm the type, subject, and details with the user before submitting, and warn that anonymous submissions cannot be tracked. check_submission returns the status of a non-anonymous submission by tracking number.

tools.name: find_press_releases
tools.title: Find Press Releases
tools.description: Search Bronx DA press releases and newsroom items by year, category, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_press_release
tools.title: Get Press Release
tools.description: Fetch a single Bronx DA press release by id.

tools.name: find_case_statistics
tools.title: Find Case Statistics
tools.description: Search AGGREGATE prosecution statistics (arrests, charging decisions, case outcomes, defendant demographics) — the figures locked today inside the office's Power BI dashboards. Never returns individual cases or defendants.

tools.name: find_programs
tools.title: Find Programs
tools.description: List Bronx DA bureaus, divisions, units, and public-facing programs by kind or free text.

tools.name: find_community_resources
tools.title: Find Community Resources
tools.description: List Bronx DA community resources and services — record sealing (CPL 160.59), BronxCAMS, immigrant affairs, court navigation, important numbers — by category or free text.

tools.name: find_victim_services
tools.title: Find Victim Services
tools.description: List crime-victim and witness services from the Crime Victims Assistance Bureau and Special Victims Division by service type or free text.

tools.name: submit_tip
tools.title: Submit a Tip / Complaint / FOIL Request
tools.description: Create a submission to the Bronx DA — a crime tip, a Civilian Complaint Unit complaint of police misconduct/brutality, a witness contact, or a FOIL records request. NET-NEW workflow with no structured intake today (a call to 718-590-2300 or an email to FOILREQUEST@BRONXDA.NYC.GOV). Mutates state — confirm type, subject, and details first; warn the user that anonymous submissions cannot be tracked.

tools.name: check_submission
tools.title: Check Submission Status
tools.description: Retrieve a non-anonymous submission and its status by tracking number.
